subLocations.name: Airship Deck
subLocations.prose: The airship becomes your base of operations. Use the destination menu to access optional areas.

optionalAreas.name: Remiem Temple
optionalAreas.prose: Accessible via chocobo from the Calm Lands. Home of the Magus Sisters aeon and celestial weapon rewards.

optionalAreas.name: Baaj Temple (Revisit)
optionalAreas.prose: Return to Baaj via airship coordinates. Anima awaits if all other aeons are obtained.

optionalAreas.name: Omega Ruins
optionalAreas.prose: High-level optional dungeon. Enter via airship coordinates. Omega Weapon is the final optional boss.
